case_title: SILBERMAN, RALPH VS HON, VICTOR et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HON, VICTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $635.00 FILED BY SILBERMAN, RALPH AS TO DEFENDANT HON, VICTOR HON, ALICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILBERMAN, RALPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HON, VICTOR HON, ALICE $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $46.00, CORRECTED JUDGMENT TO REFLECT THE $46.00 COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILBERMAN, RALPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HON, VICTOR HON, ALICE PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
